entities.name: FOOD LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes grown for food, including cool and warm-season varieties

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A cool-season food legume

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: A cool-season food legume

entities.name: MUNGBEAN
entities.description: A warm-season food legume

entities.name: URDBEAN
entities.description: A warm-season food legume

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Temperatures exceeding specific thresholds that cause stress to crops

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: The physiological stress caused by high temperatures

entities.name: TROPICAL AND SUB-TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where food legumes are grown and affected by rising temperatures

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output and yield of food legume crops

entities.name: POD SET
entities.description: The formation of pods during the reproductive stage

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seeds produced per plant or area

entities.name: POLLEN VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of pollen grains to remain alive and functional

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grains sprouting on the stigma

entities.name: POLLEN TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the pollen tube through the style to the ovule

entities.name: STIGMA RECEPTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of the stigma to receive and support pollen germination

entities.name: OVULE VIABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the ovule to be fertilized

entities.name: FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The process of fusion between male and female gametes

entities.name: FLOWER ABORTION
entities.description: The premature termination of flower development

entities.name: SUCROSE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The synthesis of sucrose in leaves, anthers, and styles

entities.name: SEED FILLING
entities.description: The stage of seed development where nutrients are accumulated

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the produced seeds

entities.name: SEED QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality and composition of the seeds

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function under high temperature conditions

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in the genetic makeup of legume crops

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources used for plant breeding

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to develop improved crop varieties

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of identifying genotypes with desired traits

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Different genetic versions of a species

entities.name: GAMETE FUNCTION
entities.description: The ability of pollen and ovules to function for reproduction

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT PHENOTYPING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Advanced methods for rapid measurement of plant traits

entities.name: GENETIC MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify or control specific traits

entities.name: ENZYMES
entities.description: Biological catalysts involved in sucrose production
